channel.title: Comments on: Left Hand Brewing – Smoke Jumper Imperial Smoked Porter, Ep. 87
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Jay Jackson
item.dc:creator: Jay Jackson
item.description:
Find the smoked porter anywhere that David Little (aka Savannah Distributing - state of GA) sells it here:
http://www.brewpot.com/BeerPG.aspx?id=34997&tabIndex=3
item.content:encoded:
Find the smoked porter anywhere that David Little (aka Savannah Distributing – state of GA) sells it here:

http://www.brewpot.com/BeerPG.aspx?id=34997&tabIndex=3

item.title: By: Video BrewMaster
item.dc:creator: Video BrewMaster
item.description: Merry Christmas to you as well Marco. And Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays to all our friends and viewers - we appreciate you all!!!!
item.content:encoded: Merry Christmas to you as well Marco. And Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays to all our friends and viewers – we appreciate you all!!!!

item.title: By: Marco Baio
item.dc:creator: Marco Baio
item.description:
Merry Christmas Paul, John and David! Thanks for the shows.
Cheers Marco
item.content:encoded:
Merry Christmas Paul, John and David!
Thanks for the shows.

Cheers Marco
